title: - Memory rot engine.

- Memory rot engine.

### V. SYSTEM TOOLS + APP LAYER

**::APPL1CAT10N.Z0N3**

- Future builds: dating app, writing app, translation engine, wordcut processor.
- Experimental apps that stem from any project branch.

### VI. FUTURE REALMS & ZONES
